Volume I

Geo-Strategy reading path

Twenty chapters in broadcast order. Each row maps one book chapter (ch01–ch20) to Jiang’s curated lecture text and the source video. Quote-forward book drafts exist only for the pilot chapters linked below; the rest of the arc is read through the lectures first.

Book architecture · Chapter queue · All volumes
